content.en:
Many peak realm gods were doubting whether the gods of the Liangyi Realm really had a big killing weapon before, and now they don't have to doubt it, but this big killing weapon is too weird!

It was so weird that they were all scared, and they even wondered if the big killing weapon could be controlled, or if it would be used against them.

Ye Tian was also very surprised, he didn't expect that the great killing weapon of the gods of the Liangyi Realm would be such a strange thing.

"This blood-colored puppet needs the body of the peak realm god or the peak demon seed as a sacrifice, otherwise it can't be urged, no wonder the Liangyi realm god has not sacrificed the big killing weapon, because the killing has not begun, the peak realm god and the peak demon seed have not fallen, and this big killing weapon cannot be used at all. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, this kind of big killing weapon should have a limit, and it is impossible to keep urging it, otherwise, the other five of the six Supreme Realm Gods will definitely be worried, and they will even join forces to deal with the Liangyi Realm Gods. "Two-Six-Seven"

As for what the limit is, he doesn't know yet.

Wow!

Under the control of the gods of the Liangyi Realm, the blood-colored puppets killed those peak demon seeds.

A pinnacle demon tried to resist, but was obliterated by the blood-colored puppet with one hand, and then swallowed it in one gulp, its combat power was too terrifying.

After a while, many peak demon seeds fell and died.

If this continues, the peak demon seeds may be killed.

"Hahaha, these peak demon seeds are no longer to be feared!"

The gods of the Liangyi Realm said excitedly.

The Taiyi Realm God also breathed a sigh of relief: "Yes, the Blood Shadow Puppet is almost invincible in the half-step extradimensional realm, no matter how many of these peak demon species there are, they can't help the Blood Shadow Puppet!"

In fact, he was also very afraid of the Blood Shadow Golems, but fortunately, the gods of the Liangyi Realm made an oath that they would not deal with them, otherwise he would not agree to this plan.

After all, if the gods of the Liangyi Realm didn't make an oath, they could be easily killed with the Blood Shadow Golem.

......

As more and more peak demon seeds fell, the remaining peak demon seeds were desperate.

Soon, their eyes became steadfast.

"Sacrifice!"

"Sacrifice!"

"Sacrifice!"

Not only these peak demon seeds sacrificed, but countless demon seeds in the entire demon seed abyss also began to sacrifice under the control and influence of these peak demon seeds.

Seeing this scene, the gods of the Liangyi Realm frowned slightly, as if they felt that something bad was about to happen.

In an instant, countless demon seeds were sacrificed, their own flesh and blood turned into ashes, and their will merged into the will of the demon seed abyss.

In fact, each Demon Seed Will can be regarded as an embodiment of the Abyssal Will, and if it is sacrificed, the will can be integrated into the Demon Seed Abyssal Will.

Of course, the peak demon seed has its own will, and it is completely possible to choose not to sacrifice, leave the abyss of the demon seed with a new life, and seek a higher realm by itself.

But the demon seed is flawed, and even if it really leaves, it may not be able to find a path to a higher realm.

If they weren't cornered, it would be impossible for these peak demon seeds to be sacrificed.

But with the sacrifice of these peak demon seeds, the countless demon seeds were also sacrificed, and the abyssal will of the demon seed gained infinite power.

In a flash.

The forbidden zero bead was crushed by the will of the demon seed abyss with one hand.

In an instant, the will of the demon seed abyss regained its freedom, and under the sacrifice of countless demon seeds, a special change occurred.

Rumble!!!!!!

The Demon Seed Abyss Will incarnate has descended.

......

The pinnacle realm gods witnessed the arrival of the demon seed abyss will, a completely black and incomparably large body descended, and the terrifying demon seed aura descended.

At this moment, the faces of the peak realm gods changed drastically, and they felt that the Eternal Dao Seed in their body was about to have a problem, and the Eternal Dao Seed seemed to have a tendency to turn into a demon seed.

"Steady!"

These pinnacle realm gods suppressed their own eternal Dao seeds, and they didn't want to fall into the realm of demon seeds.

Only those peak realm gods who had condensed the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed would ignore this situation.

Suddenly.

The Demon Seed Abyss Will incarnate struck out, killing a Peak Realm God in an instant with just one blow.

"Demon Seed Will Incarnate !!"

Such an incarnation of the abyss will of the demon seed is definitely capable of killing him in seconds, but I didn't expect the demon seeds to sacrifice and actually come up with this thing.

"Blood Shadow Golem, kill it!"

The god of the two rituals commanded.

Wow!

The Blood Shadow Golem slewd towards the Demon Seed Abyss Will, and the two sides slaughtered. []

Thundered!!!!!

The killing of the Blood Shadow Puppet and the Demon Seed Abyss Will made Ye Tian see how terrifying the combat power under the half-step transcendent realm was.

"The incarnation of the blood puppet shadow and the demon seed abyss will is almost truly invincible at the level of the pinnacle realm god, and the half-step transcendent realm that has comprehended the true transcendent power, how terrifying its strength should be!" Ye Tian could not imagine, but he would definitely be able to reach this realm in the future.....

At this time.

He was also ready to run away.

A little Blood Shadow Puppet was defeated, the Demon Seed Abyss Incarnation won, and he had the ability to enter the Eternal Realm, he would definitely run away with his relatives and enter the Void of Death as soon as possible.

But this is the last resort, the last way out of choice.

If he did, he would have to buy a Glambo ship and leave.

"I hope I don't have to go to this last step!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thundered!!!!

They are constantly killing, and it is not at all clear who wins and who loses.

But.

The Blood Shadow Golem gradually dimmed, apparently not long in support.

At this time, some peak realm gods had already begun to flee back to the realm of realm gods, and they didn't dare to stay here any longer.

But Ye Tian was still watching the battle, and he didn't want to miss such a big battle.

Moreover, he still wants to know the real victory or defeat, so naturally he can't leave.

The gods of the Liangyi Realm did not leave, and if he did, the Blood Shadow Puppet would not be able to fight.

The gods of the Liangyi Realm didn't panic too much, although the blood shadow puppet was about to be blessed, but the demon seed abyssal will couldn't last long, this demon seed abyss will was not a real will-like extradimensional life form, and the condensation of the incarnation was already the reason for the sacrifice of those demon seeds.

Now, without the demon seed continuing to sacrifice, it naturally can't last long.

4.0 has passed for a while.

The Blood Shadow Golem finally couldn't hold on anymore, and its body began to shatter.

"Run!"

The gods of the Liangyi Realm said helplessly.

Whew!!!

The remaining peak realm gods fled back to the realm of the realm gods.

Ye Tian didn't stay here anymore and fled back.

"The Blood Shadow Golem is still a little bit worse, and it didn't hold on!"

And just when these peak realm gods returned to the realm of the gods, the blood shadow puppet was completely defeated by the will of the demon seed abyss.

Immediately afterwards, the will of the Demon Seed Abyss actually tore through the barrier between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Realm God Realm, and entered the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

However, the Realm God Realm was not the home of the Demon Seed Abyss Will, and after descending to the Realm of the Realm of the Gods, its aura had decreased a lot.

However, the pinnacle realm gods are still not its opponents.
